---
title: Region Year
subtitle: Pacific Herring preliminary data summary
region: Haida Gwaii
major: true
author: Matthew Grinnell
date: "`r format(lubridate::today(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    includes:
      in_header: doc/preamble.tex
      before_body: doc/prefix.tex
      after_body: doc/suffix.tex
---

```{r setup, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
# library(knitr)
library(rmarkdown)
library(lubridate)
# theme_set(herring_theme())
```

```{r metadata, echo = FALSE}
title_new <- paste(
  metadata$region,
  # ifelse(metadata$major, "major", "minor"),
  # "stock assessment region: ",
  year(today())
  )
# metadata
```

---
title: `r title_new`
---

This is the map of BC.

```{r map_bc}

```
